title: Planting Cowpea Protocol
author: Stephanie Cullum
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rpnd5me

steps.instruction: Pat down the soil gentle to give it some firmness (but still allowing movement for seeding)
Place the seed within the created hole and then cover the seed with soil. Repeat with seeds while labelling each pot with the accession number
